general_provisions: This bill addresses the privacy of a victim and witness in a criminal investigation or action.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>addresses the requirements for access to nonpublic electronic data or information from a victim or witness when a defendant, or a defendant's attorney, seeks to obtain the nonpublic electronic data or information; and<hr><ltbullet>requires a law enforcement agency to enact a policy regarding nonpublic victim or witness data.
